title: Austin Heat Wave
lead: Austin is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.63. This anomaly is expected to have significant impacts on the city.
body:
The current heat wave in Austin has reached a critical level with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.7 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 64% and the wind speed is 4.6 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
